title: Midnight Cyan
description: A simple new dark themed UI overhaul with cyan highlights
body:
**Midnight Cyan**

A clean, modern UI overhaul for Minecraft.

_What it does:_

- Redoes the entire Minecraft UI with a dark grey + cyan color scheme
- All containers and tabs (inventory, blocks, entities) are already updated
- Keeps the world textures the same → works with any texture pack

_Why download it:_

- Sleek, modern, and easy on the eyes
- Perfect if you like dark themes with a pop of color
- Makes menus feel fresh without losing the vanilla layout

**Coming soon:**

- HUD redesign
- Widgets redesign (Villager Buttons are in this category)
- Recipe Book redesign
